assertions.title: Scribe notebook page dispatch — nmdl.canvas_width key

steps.action: Run TestProcessSectionScribePageDispatch: construct section with nmdl.canvas_width=800, call determineSectionBranch(section, bookTypeNone)
Run TestProcessSectionScribePagePriorityOverTemplate: section with both nmdl.canvas_width and nmdl.template_type
Run TestSectionHasNmdlCanvasWidth: verify nmdl.canvas_width key detection in section data
Run TestBranchPriorityOrder: nmdl.canvas_width section with bookTypeComic
steps.expected: branchScribePage takes priority over comic branch

assertions.title: Scribe notebook template dispatch — nmdl.template_type key

steps.action: Run TestProcessSectionScribeTemplateDispatch: construct section with nmdl.template_type='lined' (no nmdl.canvas_width), call determineSectionBranch
Run TestSectionHasNmdlTemplateType: verify nmdl.template_type key detection
Run TestSectionHasNmdlKeyAbsent: verify nmdl.canvas_width not detected when absent
Run TestProcessSectionComicDispatch: section with bookTypeComic, call determineSectionBranch
Run TestProcessSectionChildrenDispatch: section with bookTypeChildren, call determineSectionBranch
steps.expected: branch == branchComic (children maps to comic path)

steps.action: Run TestProcessSectionComicWithOneTemplate: comic section with exactly 1 page template, storyline with content fragment, call processSection
steps.expected: processSection succeeds, renders content from the single template
steps.observed: PASS — processSection returns ok=true with rendered content

steps.action: Run TestProcessSectionComicDispatchesToPageSpreadTemplate: verifies comic dispatch resolves $608 fragment and calls process_page_spread_page_template
steps.expected: Correct page spread template processing for comic

steps.action: Run TestProcessSectionMagazineWithConditionalTemplate: magazine section with template having $171 condition, call determineSectionBranch
Run TestProcessSectionPrintReplicaWithConditionalTemplate: print-replica section with conditional template
Run TestProcessSectionMagazineWithoutConditionalTemplate: magazine section with no condition on template
Run TestHasConditionalTemplateWithCondition: verify hasConditionalTemplate detects conditions
steps.expected: hasConditionalTemplate returns true when templates have $171 conditions

steps.action: Run TestHasConditionalTemplateWithoutCondition: verify hasConditionalTemplate returns false for no conditions

assertions.title: Default reflowable branch — last template is main

steps.action: Run TestProcessSectionReflowableDefault: section with bookTypeNone, call determineSectionBranch
Run TestProcessSectionReflowableWithEmptyBookType: empty book type string
Run TestProcessSectionReflowableWithMultipleTemplates: 3 templates (first 2 with conditions, last without), call processSection
steps.expected: processSection succeeds, last template is main, first two are conditional overlays

steps.action: Run TestProcessSectionWithNoTemplatesCreatesDefault: section with no page templates
steps.expected: processSection succeeds, creates default template from section fields

assertions.title: Conditional template evaluation — true and false conditions

steps.action: Run TestFilterConditionalTemplatesInFixedLayoutWithBinaryCondition: 3 templates [no-condition, $300 (true), NOT $300 (false)] in fixed-layout mode
steps.expected: Only templates 0 and 2 (s1 and s2) are active; s3 filtered out
steps.observed: PASS — 2 active templates returned: s1 and s2

steps.action: Run TestFilterConditionalTemplatesTrue: templates with conditions in non-fixed-layout mode
steps.expected: No filtering in non-fixed-layout — all 2 templates pass

steps.action: Run TestFilterConditionalTemplatesInFixedLayout: templates without conditions in fixed-layout
steps.expected: All templates pass (no conditions to evaluate)

steps.action: Run TestRenderSectionFragmentsSelectsActiveConditionalTemplateForFixedLayout: 2 templates with different conditions ($750/$753=inactive, $750/$752=active), fixed-layout
steps.expected: Only content from active template rendered
steps.observed: PASS — paragraphs contain only 'Active', BodyHTML contains 'Active' but not 'Inactive'

steps.action: Run TestStripUnusedKeys: section data with $702, yj.conversion.html_name, yj.semantics.*, yj.authoring.*, call stripUnusedSectionKeys
steps.expected: All 6 unused keys removed; $174, $141, keep-me preserved
steps.observed: PASS — all unused keys removed, all other keys preserved

steps.action: Run TestStripUnusedKeysPreservesUnknownKeys: section with nmdl.canvas_width, call stripUnusedSectionKeys
Run TestStripAllYjSemanticsKeys: section with 10 yj.semantics.* and yj.authoring.* keys, call stripUnusedSectionKeys
steps.observed: PASS — all keys stripped, data empty

steps.action: Run TestIsUnusedSectionKey: table-driven test with 16 keys covering $702, yj.conversion.html_name, yj.semantics.*, yj.authoring.*, and non-matching keys
steps.expected: 11 unused keys return true, 5 non-matching keys return false

summary: Tested 7 assertions (VAL-A-025 through VAL-A-031): all 7 passed. Ran 32 test functions across 2 test files (yj_to_epub_content_test.go, pipeline_test.go), all passing with exit code 0. No fixture-dependent failures encountered.
